tools.name: forms.findFormByFormName
tools.description: Returns a single form and the full revision history

tools.name: forms.findForms
tools.description: Returns an index of all available VA forms. Optionally, pass a query parameter to filter forms by form number or title.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
